name: Maruyoshi Center Inc.
summary: Maruyoshi Center Inc. operates supermarkets and restaurants in Japan. It operates 36 supermarkets and 1 restaurant. The company was formerly known as Y.K. Tokiwa Food Center and changed its name to Maruyoshi Center Inc. in 1970. Maruyoshi Center Inc. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.
